deliverables.description: Thermal-structural MRB analysis workbook with packet inputs, geometry map, scenario calculations, gates, and economics.
MRB disposition memo with recommendation, results, economics, inspections, and expert-review items.

original_fields.recommendation: No listed scenario satisfies all packet acceptance gates. Scrap the nonconforming BRK-77 hardware and hold release pending design-authority review because even nominal replacement R3 misses the fatigue gate.
